revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Power Sword | Guid=3055-7398 | Deck=One of a number of mighty blades used by the Space Marines and others in the setting of Warhammer 40,000. | Characters=Characters/Araghast_the_Pillager,Characters/Gabriel_Angelos,Characters/Heinrix_van_Calox,Characters/Thaddeus | Concepts=Concepts/Adeptus_Astartes,Concepts/Alpha_Legion,Concepts/Black_Legion,Concepts/Black_Templar,Concepts/Blood_Angels,Concepts/Blood_Ravens,Concepts/Chaos,Concepts/Chaos_Space_Marines,Concepts/Dark_Angels,Concepts/Dark_Eldar,Concepts/Eldar,Concepts/Emperors_Children,Concepts/Grey_Knights,Concepts/Imperial_Fists,Concepts/Imperial_Guard,Concepts/Imperium_of_Man,Concepts/Inquisitor,Concepts/Iron_Warriors,Concepts/Sisters_of_Battle,Concepts/Space_Marine,Concepts/Space_Marine_Chaplain,Concepts/Space_Wolves,Concepts/Ultramarines,Concepts/Word_Bearers | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dawn_of_War_II_Retribution_The_Last_Standalone,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Battle_Sister,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Chaos_Gate_Daemonhunters,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_Dark_Crusade,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_II,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_II_Retribution,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_III,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dawn_of_War_Soulstorm,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Inquisitor_Martyr,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Rogue_Trader,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine_II | Locations=Locations/Kronos | People= | Objects=Objects/Sword | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3545991-screenshot2024-02-06052722.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3545991-screenshot2024-02-06052722.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> One of a number of mighty blades used by the Space Marines and others in the setting of Warhammer 40,000.

{{Object | Name=Proton Wira | Guid=3055-7618 | Deck=Car manufactured by Malaysian carmaker Proton from 1993 to 2009. It was produced in four-door saloon and five-door hatchback models, and is based on the Mitsubishi Lancer platform. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/International_Rally_Championship,Games/Network_Q_RAC_Rally_Championship | Locations=Locations/Malaysia | People= | Objects=Objects/Car }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Car manufactured by Malaysian carmaker Proton from 1993 to 2009. It was produced in four-door saloon and five-door hatchback models, and is based on the Mitsubishi Lancer platform.

{{Object | Name=Pumpjack | Guid=3055-7736 | Deck=A pumpjack is the overground drive for a reciprocating piston pump in an oil well. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Petroleum | Franchises= | Games=Games/Factorio,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_San_Andreas,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_The_Trilogy_The_Definitive_Edition,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_V,Games/Runaway_A_Road_Adventure,Games/Rust,Games/White_Gold_War_in_Paradise | Locations=Locations/Bone_County,Locations/Factory,Locations/Gas_Station,Locations/San_Andreas | People= | Objects=Objects/Gasoline_Can,Objects/Oil_Drum,Objects/Pump,Objects/Water_Pump | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3784496-pumpjack.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3784496-pumpjack.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_tiny,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A pumpjack is the overground drive for a reciprocating piston pump in an oil well.

{{Object | Name=Pupa | Guid=3055-7288 | Deck=Pupa is an AI controlled tank that is simultaneously inspired by Metal Gear and Shagohod designs. | Characters=Characters/Big_Boss,Characters/Huey_Emmerich,Characters/Strangelove,Characters/The_Boss | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_HD_Collection,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Peace_Walker | Locations=Locations/Costa_Rica | People= | Objects=Objects/Chrysalis,Objects/Cocoon,Objects/Metal_Gear,Objects/Peace_Walker_Basilisk,Objects/Shagohod | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3497822-mgspw01212010image3.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3497822-mgspw01212010image3.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_mini,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Pupa is an AI controlled tank that is simultaneously inspired by Metal Gear and Shagohod designs.

{{Object | Name=Pyramid | Guid=3055-7468 | Deck=Pyramidal structures as an inaccessible background object or as compact objects like toys and design elements | Characters=Characters/Anubis_6177,Characters/Ra | Concepts=Concepts/Mummy,Concepts/Sphinxes | Franchises= | Games=Games/Arabian_Nights,Games/Banshee,Games/Captain_Skyhawk,Games/Delta_Force_Land_Warrior,Games/Disneys_Aladdin,Games/Empire_Total_War,Games/Global_Touring_Challenge_Africa,Games/Imhotep,Games/Impostor_Factory,Games/Injustice_2,Games/Lethal_Xcess,Games/Napoleon_Total_War,Games/Need_for_Speed_II,Games/Pharaoh,Games/Road_And_Track_presents_The_Need_for_Speed,Games/Roll_Away,Games/Tony_Hawks_American_Wasteland,Games/Transformers_Revenge_of_the_Fallen,Games/Xenon,Games/Zool_2 | Locations=Locations/Ancient_Pyramid,Locations/Giza,Locations/Pyramid | People= | Objects=Objects/Ankh,Objects/Great_Sphinx_of_Giza,Objects/Sarcophagus,Objects/Scarab_Beetle | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3628316-8966014791-12439.png }}

{{Object | Name=R-9A Arrowhead | Guid=3055-7672 | Deck=The iconic spaceship from the first R-Type. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Irem_Arcade_1,Games/R_Type,Games/R_Type_Command,Games/R_Type_Dimensions,Games/R_Type_DX,Games/R_Type_Final,Games/R_Type_Final_2,Games/R_Type_Tactics_I_II_Cosmos,Games/R_Type_Tactics_II_Operation_Bitter_Chocolate,Games/R_Types | Locations=Locations/Space | People= | Objects=Objects/Drone,Objects/Option,Objects/Spaceship | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3699073-6613858133-latest.png }}

{{Object | Name=Raiden mk-II | Guid=3055-7521 | Deck=The player 1 jet in Raiden II | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Raiden_DX,Games/Raiden_Fighters,Games/Raiden_Fighters_2,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Aces,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Jet,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Remix_Collection,Games/Raiden_II,Games/Raiden_IV,Games/Raiden_Legacy | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Bomb,Objects/Fighter_Jet,Objects/Laser,Objects/Missile,Objects/Nuclear_Bomb | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3630884-4342907649-latest.png }}

{{Object | Name=Raiden mk-IIβ | Guid=3055-7522 | Deck=The player 2 jet in Raiden II. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Player_2_Character | Franchises= | Games=Games/Raiden_DX,Games/Raiden_Fighters_2,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Aces,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Jet,Games/Raiden_Fighters_Remix_Collection,Games/Raiden_II,Games/Raiden_Legacy | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Bomb,Objects/Fighter_Jet,Objects/Laser,Objects/Missile,Objects/Nuclear_Bomb | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3630889-4398913691-latest.png }}

{{Object | Name=Rat King | Guid=3055-7753 | Deck=A rat king is a collection of rats or mice whose tails are intertwined and bound together in some way. This could be a result of an entangling material like hair, a sticky substance such as sap or gum, or the tails being tied together. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Rats | Franchises= | Games=Games/Project_Zomboid | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3809690-7667607802-1038p.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3809690-7667607802-1038p.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A rat king is a collection of rats or mice whose tails are intertwined and bound together in some way. This could be a result of an entangling material like hair, a sticky substance such as sap or gum, or the tails being tied together.

{{Object | Name=Razor Hat | Guid=3055-7420 | Aliases=Razored Hat,Blade Hat,Bladed Hat | Deck=A hat with a blade attached to it, for attacking in close combat or throwing it like a boomerang. | Characters=Characters/Kung_Lao,Characters/Oddjob,Characters/Robert_Edward_O_Speedwagon | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_Nightfire,Games/James_Bond_007_The_Duel,Games/JoJos_Bizarre_Adventure_All_Star_Battle_R,Games/JoJos_Bizarre_Adventure_Eyes_of_Heaven,Games/JoJos_Bizarre_Adventure_Phantom_Blood,Games/Midway_Arcade_Treasures_2,Games/Midway_Arcade_Treasures_Deluxe_Edition,Games/Midway_Arcade_Treasures_Extended_Play,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Mortal_Kombat_11,Games/Mortal_Kombat_2011,Games/Mortal_Kombat_3,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Advance,Games/Mortal_Kombat_And_Mortal_Kombat_II,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Arcade_Kollection,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Armageddon,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Deadly_Alliance,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Deception,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Gold,Games/Mortal_Kombat_II,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Legacy_Kollection,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Mobile,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Onslaught,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Shaolin_Monks,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Trilogy,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Unchained,Games/Mortal_Kombat_X,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat_3 | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3587627-11140-kung_lao.gif }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3587627-11140-kung_lao.gif","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/gif","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_tiny,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":"Mortal Kombat 3"},"background":[]}' /> A hat with a blade attached to it, for attacking in close combat or throwing it like a boomerang.

{{Object | Name=Red Bull | Guid=3055-7765 | Deck=Red Bull is an energy drink known to give you wiiiiings. | Characters=Characters/Goro_Majima | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Like_a_Dragon_Pirate_Yakuza_in_Hawaii,Games/PlayStation_Home | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Bar,Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Georgia,Locations/Hawaii,Locations/Humboldt_County,Locations/Japan,Locations/North_America,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/Taco_Bell_Cantina,Locations/Texas,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3811659-red-bull-energy-drink-189mg-caffeine-20-fl-oz-can_beb7fd14-9609-412c-812d-50f0f5891bef.f7c3d96ccbafc845b0a3e34b828a51ed.png }}

{{Object | Name=Renault Espace F1 | Guid=3055-7644 | Deck=The Renault Espace F1 is a concept car manufactured by Renault, based on the second generation model of the Renault Espace. It only appears in Gran Turismo 2.

{{Object | Name=Rope Ladder | Guid=3055-7665 | Deck=A folding ladder is usually made of a pair of ropes between which boards are fixed at a small distance from each other. In modern times it can be made of more advanced materials | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Backtracking | Franchises= | Games=Games/Alice_in_Wonderland_2010,Games/Digger_T_Rock_Legend_of_the_Lost_City,Games/Myst_IV_Revelation,Games/Onimusha_2_Samurais_Destiny | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Ladder,Objects/Rope,Objects/Wood | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3688612-myst4.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3688612-myst4.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny,square_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,scale_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":"Myst 4"},"background":[]}' /> In the wilderness it is part of the adventure, allowing you to move into difficult locations, in tall urban buildings it may be part of the fire protection system.

{{Object | Name=Rorschach Inkblot | Guid=3055-7684 | Deck=The presence of images from the paintings of psychiatrist Hermann Rorschach in games | Characters=Characters/Rorschach | Concepts=Concepts/Psychotherapy | Franchises= | Games=Games/The_Suffering,Games/Until_Dawn,Games/Until_Dawn_2024,Games/Watchmen_The_End_is_Nigh,Games/Watchmen_The_End_is_Nigh_Part_2 | Locations=Locations/Psychiatric_Institution | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3721701-rorschach_blot_01.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3721701-rorschach_blot_01.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,scale_super,scale_tiny,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,screen_medium,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Only for games that simply have these images, and in the case of the Rorschach Test itself in the game, see [https://www.giantbomb.com/rorschach-test/3015-13453 Concept].

{{Object | Name=SAAB 900 | Guid=3055-7575 | Deck=The Saab 900 is a mid-sized automobile produced by Swedish manufacturer Saab from 1978 until 1998 in two generations: the first from 1978 to 1994, and the second from 1994 to 1998. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/The_1980s | Franchises= | Games=Games/The_Getaway | Locations=Locations/Sweden | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3646521-3172910153-043.j.jpg }}

revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Self-Portrait (Giuseppe Maria Crespi) | Guid=3055-7723 | Deck=Painting by Giuseppe Maria Crespi | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Painter | Franchises= | Games=Games/Condemned_Criminal_Origins | Locations=Locations/Art_Museum,Locations/Library | People= | Objects=Objects/Paint,Objects/Paint_Brush,Objects/Paintings | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3776295-crespi%2C_giuseppe_maria_--_self-portrait_-_c._1700-transparent.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Shachihoko | Guid=3055-7730 | Deck=A mythical creature with the body of a fish, the head of a tiger, a raised tail and a sharp saw-like fin on its back. His image is often used in the architecture of East Asia, in particular Japan, as a fire protection charm | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Fish | Franchises= | Games=Games/Ninja_Gaiden_93686,Games/Onimusha_Blade_Warriors,Games/Onimusha_Dawn_of_Dreams | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/China,Locations/Japan,Locations/Rooftops | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3778265-shachihoko.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3778265-shachihoko.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_super,scale_small,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A mythical creature with the body of a fish, the head of a tiger, a raised tail and a sharp saw-like fin on its back. His image is often used in the architecture of East Asia, in particular Japan, as a fire protection charm
